pages.text:
Ferro Dynamics Trading Corp.
Global Metals Sourcing & Trading
Proposal in Response to RFP RM-2026-014 — Meridian Autoparts Inc.
Submitted: June 24, 2026

Executive Summary
Ferro Dynamics Trading (FDT) is a metals trading firm with sourcing relationships across North America and
Southeast Asia. We are pleased to offer competitive pricing on Cold-Rolled Steel coil and Aluminum sheet for
Meridian's Elkhart facility by leveraging our international mill network. As a trading company rather than a mill or
service center, FDT does not hold physical inventory and operates on a purchase-order-to-mill-order model.

Materials Offered & Specifications
         Req #      Material           FDT Offering                                       Meets Spec?
         REQ-01     CRS Coil           Comparable to ASTM A1008, 0.8-2.5mm                Not confirmed (tolerance not stated)
         REQ-02     CRS Coil           Yield strength data available on request           Not stated
         REQ-03     Aluminum Sheet     5052 equivalent grade, 1.0-3.0mm                   Partial (grade equivalence, not exact spec)
         REQ-04     Aluminum Sheet     Surface finish not specified in this offer         Not stated
         REQ-05     Both               MTC available for steel only, Type 2.1             No (wrong MTC type, aluminum missing)
         REQ-06     Both               Traceability provided by originating mill only     Partial

Pricing
 Item                                  Notes
 Cold-Rolled Steel Coil                Approx. $860-910 / MT depending on mill allocation at order time
 Aluminum 5052 Sheet                   Approx. $2,950-3,050 / MT depending on origin
 Pricing basis                         Spot pricing confirmed at time of each purchase order; no fixed or published index
 Minimum order quantity                500 MT per SKU per order

Delivery & Service Levels
FDT targets on-time delivery of 90-93% given reliance on ocean/rail freight from overseas mill partners for a
portion of volume. Standard lead time is 4-6 weeks for imported material and 3 weeks for domestically sourced
allocations; no expedite option is offered. Defect/non-conformance rate is not tracked in aggregate across
FDT's supplier network and would need to be assessed per shipment. Liability insurance certificate available
upon request; specific coverage amount not included in this proposal. No business continuity plan was
provided.

Certifications & Compliance
pages.md:
Ferro Dynamics Trading Corp. Global Metals Sourcing & Trading Proposal in Response to RFP RM-2026-014 — Meridian Autoparts Inc. Submitted: June 24, 2026

# Executive Summary

Ferro Dynamics Trading (FDT) is a metals trading firm with sourcing relationships across North America and Southeast Asia. We are pleased to offer competitive pricing on Cold-Rolled Steel coil and Aluminum sheet for Meridian's Elkhart facility by leveraging our international mill network. As a trading company rather than a mill or service center, FDT does not hold physical inventory and operates on a purchase-order-to-mill-order model.

# Materials Offered & Specifications

| Req #  | Material       | FDT Offering                                   | Meets Spec?                                 |
| ------ | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| REQ-01 | CRS Coil       | Comparable to ASTM A1008, 0.8-2.5mm            | Not confirmed (tolerance not stated)        |
| REQ-02 | CRS Coil       | Yield strength data available on request       | Not stated                                  |
| REQ-03 | Aluminum Sheet | 5052 equivalent grade, 1.0-3.0mm               | Partial (grade equivalence, not exact spec) |
| REQ-04 | Aluminum Sheet | Surface finish not specified in this offer     | Not stated                                  |
| REQ-05 | Both           | MTC available for steel only, Type 2.1         | No (wrong MTC type, aluminum missing)       |
| REQ-06 | Both           | Traceability provided by originating mill only | Partial                                     |

# Pricing

| Item                   | Notes                                                                              |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Cold-Rolled Steel Coil | Approx. $860-910 / MT depending on mill allocation at order time                   |
| Aluminum 5052 Sheet    | Approx. $2,950-3,050 / MT depending on origin                                      |
| Pricing basis          | Spot pricing confirmed at time of each purchase order; no fixed or published index |
| Minimum order quantity | 500 MT per SKU per order                                                           |

# Delivery & Service Levels

FDT targets on-time delivery of 90-93% given reliance on ocean/rail freight from overseas mill partners for a portion of volume. Standard lead time is 4-6 weeks for imported material and 3 weeks for domestically sourced allocations; no expedite option is offered. Defect/non-conformance rate is not tracked in aggregate across FDT's supplier network and would need to be assessed per shipment. Liability insurance certificate available upon request; specific coverage amount not included in this proposal. No business continuity plan was provided.

# Certifications & Compliance

pages.text:
Certification status varies by originating mill and is not centrally documented by FDT; specific mill certifications
(IATF 16949, ISO 14001) can be requested on a per-order basis once a mill is allocated. Conflict minerals
disclosure is not addressed in this proposal. Country of melt/pour varies by order and may include
non-domestic mills, which may not satisfy Buy America / regional content requirements without further
verification.

Payment & Commercial Terms
Payment terms: 30% deposit at order confirmation, balance Net 30 from delivery. No VMI, consignment, or
inventory-holding arrangement is offered under the trading model described above.

Contact: trading@ferrodynamics-example.com | Reference: FDT-2026-0614 | Pricing subject to change at time of order
confirmation.
